mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS path signals easier discount rates and higher equity present values, so S&P 500 returns are positive over the next month when the policy rate has been reduced or is clearly trending lower.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive more often than negative during periods of falling FEDFUNDS, or if the signal's rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is rising above the Federal Reserve's comfort zone, higher expected policy restraint and real rate pressure depress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates above its prior 3-month pace and FEDFUNDS is above 4.0%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances do not deliver negative 20-day SPX returns in at least 60% of cases, or if the interaction term is not significant relative to each single-series effect.

mechanism_narrative: A declining UNRATE indicates improving labor-market slack absorption and stronger household income expectations, which supports cyclical earnings and lifts S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if falls in UNRATE fail to coincide with positive 20-day SPX returns more often than chance, or if the rolling 3-year IC is below 0.02 for any sustained period.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals imminent earnings downgrades and recession risk, so S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if post-trigger 5-day SPX returns are not negative in a majority of events, or if the trigger has no incremental predictive power versus unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS together with rising PAYEMS captures broad demand expansion in sales and payrolls, which improves earnings breadth and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint uptrend in RSAFS and PAYEMS does not outperform either series alone, or if triggered positive co-movements fail to produce positive 20-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST drops below its recent range, it marks a housing-demand slowdown that feeds into weaker construction activity and slower cyclical growth, pushing S&P 500 returns lower over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if sub-moving-average HOUST readings are followed by non-negative 60-day SPX returns as often as negative ones, or if the signal loses significance after controlling for market trend.

mechanism_narrative: A faster INDPRO trend with stable inflation reflects real output growth without immediate price pressure, which supports margins and risk appetite, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises above its 3-month average while CPIAUCSL monthly inflation stays below 0.3%
failure_condition: Reject if high-INDPRO/low-CPI episodes do not lead to positive 60-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the interaction effect disappears when CPI inflation is stable.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly decline in GDPC1 following prior strength signals demand deceleration that eventually hits earnings expectations, so S&P 500 returns are negative over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 slowdowns are not followed by negative 60-day SPX returns more often than positive ones, or if the relationship is absent in rolling 3-year out-of-sample tests.
